faqs.question: Tell me about Aahana?
faqs.answer:
Aahana Bobade is a fullstack developer with 3+ years of experience building high-performance web apps. She lives at the intersection of backend engineering, AI/ML, and data science — crafting systems that are both intelligent and scalable.

Her current focus: technical SEO, performance optimization, and AI-powered features. She specializes in Next.js, React, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL.

Off the keyboard, she's into coffee, guitar, and exploring new technologies.

faqs.question: What projects has Aahana built?
faqs.answer:
Here are some highlights from Aahana's project work:

1. Ling's Home — Digital service management platform serving 100+ businesses (Next.js, PostgreSQL, Stripe).
2. EduVance Platform — AI-powered EdTech with personalized learning paths and RAG pipelines (FastAPI, Python, GenAI, AWS).
3. Performance Dashboard — Real-time analytics with technical SEO tracking, improving page loads by 60% (Next.js, D3.js).
4. Design System UI Library — Reusable component library that cut dev time by 40% (React, Storybook, TypeScript).
5. E-commerce Platform — Full transaction flow with Stripe and real-time inventory sync (Next.js, PostgreSQL, Redis).

Open the projects.js tab to dig into the details.

faqs.question: Tell me about her work experience
faqs.answer:
Aahana's professional journey:

• 2025 - Present — Junior Software Developer @ EduVanceAI. Building intelligent backends, ML personalization, and RAG pipelines serving thousands of learners daily.

• Jun 2023 – Aug 2023 — User Experience Designer @ Zepto Digital Labs. Designed UI for a simulation platform using design thinking and UX research.

• Jun 2023 – Jul 2023 — Back End Intern @ Laser Technologies Pvt Ltd. Maintained backend systems and databases for enterprise web applications.

Check experience.ts for the full timeline.

faqs.question: What's her tech stack?
faqs.answer:
Aahana's primary stack:

Languages: Python, TypeScript, JavaScript, SQL, Java
Frontend: React, Next.js, Tailwind CSS, Vue.js
Backend: FastAPI, Flask, Django, Express, NestJS
Databases: PostgreSQL, MongoDB, Redis
GenAI / LLM: LangChain, RAG pipelines, prompt engineering, vector search (Faiss, Pinecone, Weaviate)
ML / Data: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn
DevOps: Docker, Git, GitHub Actions, AWS, Vercel

Open skills.json for the full breakdown with proficiency levels.

faqs.answer:
Easiest ways to reach Aahana:

She typically responds within 24 hours. The contact.css tab has a form too if you'd rather drop a message there.

faqs.question: How can I support Aahana?
faqs.answer:
Sweet of you to ask. A few easy ways to support Aahana:

• ⭐ Star her projects on GitHub (github.com/aahana).
• 🔁 Share her work with folks who'd find it useful.
• 💬 Connect on LinkedIn and engage with her posts.
• 💼 Refer her for interesting backend / AI / fullstack roles.
• ☕ Buy her a coffee — she runs on it.

Genuine feedback on her projects is always welcome.
